rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/24/19. Petitioner filed a Supplement that increases the amount to be distributed and requests that it be distributed to the SF County Treasurer. As these are material changes to the Amended Petition and the Amendment thereto, a Second Amendment to Petition must be filed, with at least 15 days' notice to all interested parties. In addition, please include legal authority for distributing the heir's share to the County from a conservatorship. Endorsed-filed copies of all documents filed must be received in Room 202 by 6/17/19.
